testcase.name: test_bl_coins_checkout_returns_live_session
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stripe_live_payments_iteration160.py:120: in test_bl_coins_checkout_returns_live_session assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"BL Coins checkout failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: BL Coins checkout failed: {"detail":"Price mismatch. Please refresh and try again."} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_subscriptions_page_data
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stripe_live_payments_iteration160.py:301: in test_subscriptions_page_data tier_names = [t.get("name", "").lower() for t in tiers] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_stripe_live_payments_iteration160.py:301: in <listcomp> tier_names = [t.get("name", "").lower() for t in tiers] ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'
